'''pagozho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:oesophagostomy|oesophagostomy]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-g-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:oesophagostomy|oesophagostomy]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| pagozho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:pægezheth|pægezheth]] || [[word:pægezhej|pægezhej]] || [[word:pægezhesh|pægezhesh]] || [[word:pægezhe|pægezhe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:pagogozhoth|pagogozhoth]] || [[word:pagogozhoj|pagogozhoj]] || [[word:pagogozhosh|pagogozhosh]] || [[word:pagogozho|pagogozho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:pagozhoth|pagozhoth]] || [[word:pagozhoj|pagozhoj]] || [[word:pagozhosh|pagozhosh]] || [[word:pagozho|pagozho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:pagofzhoth|pagofzhoth]] || [[word:pagofzhoj|pagofzhoj]] || [[word:pagofzhosh|pagofzhosh]] || [[word:pagofzhof|pagofzhof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:pagozhotho|pagozhotho]] || [[word:pagozhojo|pagozhojo]] || [[word:pagozhosho|pagozhosho]] || [[word:pagozhoko|pagozhoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:pagozhoth|pagozhoth]] || [[word:pagozhoj|pagozhoj]] || [[word:pagozhosh|pagozhosh]] || [[word:pagozho|pagozho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:pagozhothol|pagozhothol]] || [[word:pagozhojol|pagozhojol]] || [[word:pagozhoshol|pagozhoshol]] || [[word:pagozhokol|pagozhokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:pagozhothotho|pagozhothotho]] || [[word:pagozhojojo|pagozhojojo]] || [[word:pagozhoshosho|pagozhoshosho]] || [[word:pagozhoko|pagozhoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:pagozhothon|pagozhothon]] || [[word:pagozhojon|pagozhojon]] || [[word:pagozhoshon|pagozhoshon]] || [[word:pagozhokon|pagozhokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:pagozhothoro|pagozhothoro]] || [[word:pagozhojoro|pagozhojoro]] || [[word:pagozhoshoro|pagozhoshoro]] || [[word:pagozhokoro|pagozhokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|0c4abda}}
